corunner_cpu_note: different physical core sharing the L3 (cpu3, the SMT sibling of the benchmark cpu2, is taken offline for the campaign; placing a co-runner on the sibling would measure SMT interference, a separate deliberate experiment)

abort.nominal_note: frequency pinned by the operator: scaling_min_freq = scaling_max_freq = 3.2 GHz on the benchmark CPU (session-1 calibration 320.2 ms reproduces under the pin, so session 1 is in the same speed regime)

note: Profile B campaign per plan/ndt_timing_measurement_policy.md; sample tiers per the paper_fix.md budget matrix (1000+ only for tail-claim fixtures; co-runners on union-worst + legal-worst only). Frequency pinned at 3.2 GHz from session 1 onward.
